title: Ulufale
signIn: Saini ia ulufale e amata lou tofotofoina
forgotPasswordInstructions: Ulufale le tuatusi imeli e te fa'aoga e ulufale ai i lou tala'aga
forgotPasswordSendEmail: O le a matou auina atu se imeli fa'atasi ma fa'atonuga e filifili ai se upu fa'aoga fou.
twoFactorInstructions: Fa'aoga lou authenticator ua fa'atuina e maua ai se code ma ulufale iinei.
emailVerificationInstructions: Ulufale le code saogalemu na auina atu i lou imeli.
passwordMustHave: E tatau ona iai i le upu fa'aoga:
atLeast8Chars: le itiiti ifo ma le 8 mau
atLeast1Uppercase: le itiiti ifo ma le 1 mataitusi tetele
atLeast1Lowercase: le itiiti ifo ma le 1 mataitusi laiti
atLeast1Number: le itiiti ifo ma le 1 numera
atLeast1SpecialChar: le itiiti ifo ma le 1 mau fa'apitoa
welcomeBack: Afio mai fo'i i la tatou nu'u fa'atupulaia
pleaseEnterValidEmail: Fa'amolemole ulufale se tuatusi imeli aoga
pleaseEnterGiftcard: Fa'amolemole ulufale le numera kata meaalofa
invalidCode: Code sese, fa'amolemole ulufale le code saʻo.

oauth.twoFactorPrompt: Ua fa'aogaina fa'amaoniga lua mo lenei tala'aga. Ulufale lou code authenticator e fa'ai'u ai le ulufale.
oauth.noLinkedAccount: E leai se tala'aga feso'ota'i mo {name}. Ulufale ou fa'amatalaga ulufale e feso'ota'i ai, pe fatuina se tala'aga fou.
oauth.verifyEmailSent: Ua auina atu se code fa'amaoniga i lou imeli.
oauth.authFailed: Ua fai sese le fa'amaoniga OAuth
oauth.failedToLink: Ua fai sese le feso'ota'i tala'aga
oauth.enterEmailAndPassword: Fa'amolemole ulufale le imeli ma le upu fa'aoga

sudo.redirecting: Ua ulufale oe o se tagata fa'atau, fa'afesiitaʻi i le aʻoa.
